# v2.2.1 — full-fidelity auto-generated Python bindings + drift check

## Scope

The proposal content is the two GitHub issue bodies plus a Session 7
scope expansion. This file is a thin pointer + implementation log.

Issues:
- gh#54 — pip wrapper bindings sync (primary, consumer-blocking)
- gh#55 — orphan ENTROPIC_EXPORT pre-commit check (companion)

**Session 7 scope expansion (architectural):** The kickoff envisioned
manual sync of the 9 missing symbols plus a presence-check hook. After
discovery, the user elected to compress the timeline and tackle full
auto-generation of the bindings module — the root cause of the recurring
"wrapper drifted from C ABI" miss across v2.1.10 / v2.1.11 / v2.1.12.

Replaces the existing partial `inv gen-bindings` generator (regex-only,
skips inline function-pointer params, hard-codes a stale `EntropicError`
prologue missing `NO_VISION_TIER`) with a complete generator that
handles:

- `typedef enum` from types/*.h + entropic.h → IntEnum classes
- `typedef struct` → ctypes.Structure
- Named callback typedefs `typedef R (*name)(args)` → CFUNCTYPE
- Inline function-pointer parameters → minted module-level CFUNCTYPE
- All ENTROPIC_EXPORT function declarations → `_bind()` lines
- Doxygen `/** ... */` blocks → Python docstrings (@brief, @param,
  @return, @version preserved)
- `/* @python-alias: NAME */` annotations → backward-compat aliases
  (preserves gh#22 `HOOK_CALLBACK_CB`, `TOKEN_STREAM_CB`)

Output: `python/src/entropic/_bindings.py` (fully generated) +
`python/src/entropic/_bindings_manifest.py` (eager-importable export
manifest — no ctypes, no .so load).

Pre-commit hook: `inv gen-bindings --check` regenerates to tempfiles
and diffs against committed output. Drift = exit 1, fail loud.

Also lands inline: `docs/releasing.md` improvements capturing v2.2.0
release-process lessons (see Session 7 kickoff prompt).

## Locked design decisions (do not re-litigate)

- **Two issues, one patch.** Defense-in-depth + the fix it defends.
- **No new dependencies.** Hand-rolled bracket-aware C declaration
  parser instead of pycparser (which requires preprocessing + a
  fake_libc_include shim — operational complexity exceeding the
  parsing-quality marginal gain on this uniform header).
- **Strictly additive at the C ABI.** Zero C/C++ source changes.
  SONAME stays at 2. ABI compatibility with v2.2.0 consumers preserved.
- **Wrapper-layer API also strictly additive.** All existing symbol
  names and signatures preserved. New symbols added. Internal file
  structure changes are not consumer-visible (the `_bindings.py`
  module path is a private implementation detail per leading underscore).
- **Generator is the source of truth.** `_bindings.py` becomes
  auto-generated; manual edits will be reverted by the drift check on
  next commit. The `/* @python-alias */` annotation in `entropic.h` is
  how human-policy aliases survive generation.
- **`_FACADE_EXPORTS` stays hand-curated.** Pythonic facades (`hook`
  decorator, `register_server`, etc.) live in their own modules and
  are not auto-generatable from the C header. They remain a 5-name
  static frozenset in `__init__.py`.

## Implementation Log

### 2026-05-15

- [x] Read both issue bodies + architecture-cpp.md + entropic.h survey
- [x] Surfaced curation-vs-generation conflict; user elected full
      auto-gen path (compresses what would have been a v2.3.0 milestone
      into v2.2.1)
- [x] Confirmed existing `inv gen-bindings` is bit-rotted (hard-coded
      prologue with stale EntropicError missing NO_VISION_TIER=50)
- [x] Proposal pointer committed; feature branch cut from develop
- [x] Built new generator at `scripts/gen_bindings.py` — full-fidelity
      C declaration parser (bracket-aware split, struct + named-cb +
      inline-fnptr emission, const-stripping, pointer-to-cb support)
- [x] Replaced 256 LOC of dead regex generator in tasks.py with a
      thin `inv gen-bindings [--check]` shim
- [x] Generator output: 86 bound functions (was 25), 8 IntEnum classes
      (was 3), 3 ctypes.Structure types (was 2), 11 CFUNCTYPE typedefs
      (was 7), all 9 v2.2.0 wrapper-sync misses now reachable
- [x] `_bindings_manifest.py` emission; `__init__.py` consumes manifest
      via `from _bindings_manifest import EXPORTS`
- [x] `test_bindings_abi.py` updated to parse manifest (preserves
      static AST-based ABI conformance checks without importing the .so)
- [x] Pre-commit hook `gen-bindings-check` wired with file filter for
      header / wrapper / generator paths
- [x] Hook self-test in `test_gen_bindings.py` — synthesizes a fake
      ENTROPIC_EXPORT and verifies the generator emits a binding for it
- [x] ruff-format + flake8 exclusions for auto-generated files
      (formatting is the generator's responsibility; reflowing would
      break the drift detector)
- [x] All 913 ctest cases pass; all 23 Python unit tests pass
      (including 2 new generator self-tests)
- [x] `docs/releasing.md` updated with three v2.2.0 lessons
- [x] `RELEASE_NOTES.md` v2.2.1 entry prepended
- [x] ACTIVE → STAGED move (this commit)
- [ ] --no-ff merge to develop (next commit)

**Decision:** Adopted two-file generator output instead of a single
file. `_bindings.py` holds the live ctypes; `_bindings_manifest.py`
holds just the frozenset of public names. `__init__.py` imports the
manifest eagerly (no .so load) so `entropic install-engine` still
works before the native binary is on disk — preserving the v1.7.x
lazy-loading contract.

**Decision:** Hand-rolled C parser instead of pycparser. pycparser
requires preprocessed input + a fake_libc_include shim. The hand-
rolled parser is ~600 LOC of pure Python with no new dependencies
and handles the uniform-C surface of entropic.h cleanly.

**Files changed:**
- `scripts/gen_bindings.py` (new — generator)
- `python/src/entropic/_bindings.py` (auto-generated rewrite)
- `python/src/entropic/_bindings_manifest.py` (new — auto-generated)
- `python/src/entropic/__init__.py` (consumes manifest)
- `tasks.py` (-256 LOC dead regex generator; +thin `inv` shim)
- `.pre-commit-config.yaml` (new hook + excludes for auto-gen files)
- `tests/unit/test_bindings_abi.py` (manifest-aware AST parser)
- `tests/unit/test_gen_bindings.py` (new — self-test)
- `docs/releasing.md` (3 lessons captured)
- `RELEASE_NOTES.md` (v2.2.1 entry)
